data.title: S&P Global Ratings says Tether’s stability is ‘weak’
data.description:
S&P Global Ratings has lowered Tether's rating to its lowest possible level in its most recent Stablecoin Stability Assessment.
source: https://protos.com/sp-global-ratings-says-tethers-stability-is-weak/

data.title: Federal Reserve Beige Book: Multiple reports indicate businesses may face financial pressure due to tariffs.
data.description: The Federal Reserve's Beige Book: Multiple reports indicate that corporate profit margins are squeezed, possibly due to financial pressure from tariffs. (Jinshi)

data.title: The U.S. Treasury announced the replacement index figure for the October CPI based on Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities.
data.description: The U.S. Treasury Department announced the index figure based on the index contingency provisions of its Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities (TIPS). In a press release, the Treasury stated that the index figure for October 2025 was 325.604. For payment obligations that rely on the October 2025 CPI, the Treasury will use this index figure as the basis for calculations. Even if the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) subsequently releases the actual October 2025 CPI, the Treasury will not replace this index figure. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Treasury Announces Index Value for Inflation-Protected Bonds
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Treasury Department has announced the index value for inflation-protected bonds based on the emergency clause of the index. In a press release, the Treasury stated that the index value for October 2025 is set at 325.604. This figure will be used as the basis for calculating payment obligations that rely on the Consumer Price Index (CPI) for October 2025. Even if the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) later releases the actual CPI for October 2025, the Treasury will not replace this index number.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Beige Book Highlights Business Profit Margin Pressures
data.description: According to Odaily, the Federal Reserve's Beige Book reveals that several reports indicate businesses are experiencing squeezed profit margins. This financial strain may be attributed to tariffs.

data.title: Federal Reserve Beige Book Highlights Economic Stability
data.description: According to Odaily, the Federal Reserve's Beige Book indicates that economic activity has largely remained unchanged across most regions since the previous report. However, two regions noted a slight decline in economic activity, while one region reported a modest increase.

data.title: "Liquidation King" Brother Machi continues to add to his long positions in ETH and HYPE, and now has a floating profit of over $860,000.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that Brother Machi has continued to increase his long positions in ETH and HYPE, and has now made a floating profit of $863,000. Specifically: ETH long position: position value of $16.76 million, floating profit of $613,000; HYPE long position: position value of $4.42 million, floating profit of $250,000.

data.title: The Federal Reserve's Beige Book reported that most districts indicated that economic activity was essentially unchanged from the previous reading.
data.description: The Federal Reserve's Beige Book: Most districts reported that economic activity was largely unchanged since the last report; however, two districts noted a slight decline in activity, while one district reported a slight increase. (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve Beige Book: Employment declined slightly during the reporting period.
data.description: The Federal Reserve's Beige Book: Employment declined slightly during the reporting period, with about half of the districts reporting weak labor demand. (Jinshi)

data.title: Tech Stocks Surge Ahead Of Thanksgiving, Robinhood Rallies 10%: What's Moving Markets Wednesday?
data.description:
Stocks were mainly higher at midday as Wall Street traded higher ahead of the Thanksgiving holiday. Investors are likely optimistic as markets enter what is typically the strongest stretch of the year for corporate sales.

data.title: Naver Acquires Dunamu for $10.3 Billion
data.description:
Naver buys Dunamu, Upbit's operator, in a $10. 3 billion all-stock deal to enhance digital asset strategy.
source: https://coincu.com/news/naver-acquires-dunamu-cryptocurrency-market/

data.title: Nasdaq ISE Files to Lift BlackRock IBIT Option Limits Into Top Tier Status
data.description:
The Nasdaq International Securities Exchange (ISE) has officially submitted a request to raise the option limits for BlackRock's Investment Grade Bond and Income Trust (IBIT) products, aiming to elevate them into a higher tier status. This move is part of a broader strategy to enhance trading opportunities and liquidity for investors in these financial instruments, reflecting a commitment to promoting robust market activity and supporting the investment goals of their clients. By achieving this top-tier status, BlackRock's IBIT options will likely offer greater flexibility and appeal to traders and investors seeking to navigate the complexities of the current financial landscape.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/11/26/nasdaq-ise-files-to-lift-blackrock-ibit-option-limits-into-top-tier-status

data.title: FSB joins Russia’s mining crackdown busting the crypto farm of a politician’s son
data.description:
Russia’s powerful Federal Security Service (FSB) is now taking part in efforts to curb illegal cryptocurrency mining across the vast country. Russian law enforcement’s latest hit is the Bitcoin farm of a businessman with political connections, arrested for the theft of electricity worth millions of rubles. FSB disrupts major illegal mining operation in Chelyabinsk Officers […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/fsb-joins-russias-mining-crackdown/

data.title: Dogecoin ETF Logs $1.4 Million in Debut Volume, Nearly 10 Times Below Initial Forecast
data.description:
Key Insights: The first spot Dogecoin ETF launched on November 24, with $1. 4 million in trading volume, significantly below Bloomberg senior ETF analyst Eric Balchunas’s $12 million day-one forecast. Grayscale’s GDOG became the first memecoin-related ETF in the US, but attracted roughly 10 times less volume than initially projected. Balchunas called the performance “solid for […] The post Dogecoin ETF Logs $1
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/11/26/dogecoin-etf-logs-1-4-million-in-debut-volume-nearly-10-times-below-initial-forecast/

data.title: South Korea's Stablecoin War Heats Up As Tech Giants Race To Challenge Dollar Dominance
data.description:
South Korea’s race to build a Korean won-pegged stablecoin escalated today as KakaoBank signaled a move from planning to active development, while rival tech giant Naver officially confirmed a $10. 3 billion merger with the nation’s largest crypto exchange. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/Opinion/25/11/49091933/south-koreas-stablecoin-war-heats-up-as-tech-giants-race-to-challenge-dollar-dominance?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: House Democrats Issue Report Detailing Trump Crypto Ties as 'New Age of Corruption'
data.description:
House Democrats have released a comprehensive report that outlines the connections between former President Donald Trump and the cryptocurrency sector, characterizing these relationships as indicative of a troubling 'new age of corruption' in American politics. The report delves into various aspects of Trump's involvement with cryptocurrency ventures and highlights the potential implications for ethics and transparency in government.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2025/11/26/house-democrats-issue-report-detailing-trump-s-crypto-ties-as-new-age-of-corruption
